author_revisions_made.disposition: Mark D as satisfying the exact row or narrow the requirement and rationale to separate-account isolation.
author_revisions_made.summary: Option D uses a member account and therefore satisfies the literal requirement as written, despite failing the separate grouping/control requirements.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Mark B as satisfying literal existing-account coverage or narrow the requirement to centrally governed organization coverage.
author_revisions_made.summary: Independent same-setting trails can cover configured events in existing accounts; B fails central protection, automatic joining-account coverage, and overhead instead.

author_revisions_made.disposition: State selected-OU targeting in D if Region is its sole intended failure, or mark scope failure and revise the rationale.
author_revisions_made.summary: Option D does not state that it targets the selected OU even though the matrix credits that requirement.

author_revisions_made.disposition: Replace D with an independently wrong access mechanism whose defect B cannot cure, and update its rationale and matrix.
author_revisions_made.summary: Under a normal compositional reading, keyed B supplies the guardrail that D alone lacks, making B+D a second defensible Identity Center plus SCP pair.

identified_concerns.summary: Option D uses a member account and therefore satisfies the literal requirement as written, despite failing the separate grouping/control requirements.
Independent same-setting trails can cover configured events in existing accounts; B fails central protection, automatic joining-account coverage, and overhead instead.
Option D does not state that it targets the selected OU even though the matrix credits that requirement.
Under a normal compositional reading, keyed B supplies the guardrail that D alone lacks, making B+D a second defensible Identity Center plus SCP pair.
